mapper.select: SELECT s.id, s.contact_id, s.shared_by, s.shared_with, s.del_flag, s.create_time, s.update_time, a.contact_name AS `name`, a.phone, a.email, a.company FROM oa_address_share s LEFT JOIN oa_address_book a ON s.contact_id = a.id WHERE s.shared_by = #{sharedBy} AND s.del_flag = 0 ORDER BY s.create_time DESC

SELECT s.id, s.contact_id, s.shared_by, s.shared_with, s.del_flag, s.create_time, s.update_time, a.contact_name AS `name`, a.phone, a.email, a.company FROM oa_address_share s LEFT JOIN oa_address_book a ON s.contact_id = a.id WHERE s.shared_with = #{sharedWith} AND s.del_flag = 0 ORDER BY s.create_time DESC
